data.title: Maple Finance Withdraws syrupUSDT from Aave Mantle
data.description: On April 20, Maple Finance announced the withdrawal of all syrupUSDT from Aave Mantle. According to BlockBeats, the decision was made to ensure the security of assets. The syrupUSDC and syrupUSDT tokens remain unaffected by the rsETH vulnerability.

data.title: U.S.-Iran Tensions Escalate Amid Conflicting Negotiation Reports
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump has made several positive statements regarding U.S.-Iran relations over the past 24 hours. According to BlockBeats, Trump announced that U.S. representatives would arrive in Islamabad on April 20 to participate in talks scheduled for April 21. However, Iran has rejected participation in a second round of negotiations, calling the reports false and leaving the future of discussions uncertain.

In recent developments, the U.S. military intercepted an Iranian commercial vessel, forcing it to return. Trump stated that the U.S. Marines have taken control of the Iranian ship attempting to breach the blockade. Iran responded by preparing for potential military conflict, warning of severe consequences if hostilities resume.

Iranian officials have expressed readiness for both diplomatic and military confrontation. The Iranian parliament speaker indicated that tensions nearly reignited during negotiations, and the threat of war remains. Iran has also arrested four individuals, including two foreigners, for alleged involvement in a spy network.

The U.S. has redeployed the USS Ford aircraft carrier to the Middle East following brief repairs. A recent poll shows that over 60% of Americans oppose expanding military actions against Iran. Trump noted ongoing internal conflicts between moderates and hardliners in Iran, claiming Iran has agreed to many terms of a proposed deal.

Israel is reportedly preparing for potential escalation with Iran, despite a current ceasefire. The Israeli defense minister has instructed the military to be ready for any threats in Lebanon.

In the Strait of Hormuz, UAE officials have called for unconditional reopening, while Iran has blocked two oil tankers from passing through. Iran claims control over the strait's security with strategic partners. Germany is preparing its navy for possible deployment in the region.

Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran remain uncertain, with conflicting reports about the participation of U.S. envoy Vance. Trump accused Iran of violating the ceasefire agreement but remains hopeful for a peace deal. Iran has refused to send a delegation as long as maritime blockades persist, and insists on retaining enriched uranium.

The situation remains tense, with Iran rejecting further talks and questioning U.S. intentions. The prospect of renewed negotiations is unclear, as both sides maintain firm stances.

data.title: Ethereum Daily Transactions Reach Record High Despite Slowing Retail Demand
data.description: Ethereum has achieved a new milestone with daily transactions surpassing 3.61 million, marking an all-time high. According to NS3.AI, this surge in activity occurs despite a recent slowdown in speculative retail demand from investors. The increase in transactions highlights Ethereum's growing utility and adoption in various applications, even as retail interest wanes.

data.title: An account with a win rate exceeding 58% has purchased a total of $120,000 worth of NBA playoff games, with the Rockets defeating the Lakers.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Playoffs Rockets vs. Lakers" prediction event, an account with a winning percentage over 58% (address: 0x829358994260e23b64ce0148c34ec0412753ddf4) purchased $110,000 worth of bets on the Rockets defeating the Lakers, with an average opening price of 64.4¢. Additionally, $13,000 was placed on the Rockets winning with a 4.5-point spread against the Lakers. The NBA playoffs game between the Rockets and the Lakers will start at 8:30 AM Beijing time. The Lakers will be without Doncic and Rivers; the Rockets will be without VanVleet and Adams. Furthermore, renowned NBA reporter Shams reported that Rockets star Durant will miss this game. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Account with a profit of $400,000 and a total purchase of $1,180,000: NBA Playoffs - Spurs defeat Trail Blazers
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket "NBA Playoffs Spurs vs. Trail Blazers" prediction event, an account that profited $400,000 (address: 0x36257cb65f199caa86f7d30625bbc1250a981187) purchased $1,050,000 worth of bets on the Spurs defeating the Trail Blazers, with an average opening price of 85.6¢. Additionally, it purchased nearly $130,000 worth of bets on the Spurs to win by a 10.5-point spread against the Trail Blazers, with an average opening price of 56.6¢. The NBA Playoffs game between the Spurs and Trail Blazers will tip off at 9:00 AM Beijing time. In the regular season, the Spurs and Trail Blazers have faced each other three times, with the Spurs holding a 2-1 advantage. Notably, Wernbane missed all three games due to injury. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Iranian Vice President Links Strait of Hormuz Security to Oil Export Restrictions
data.description: Iranian First Vice President Aref has stated that security in the Strait of Hormuz is not without cost, especially while Iran's oil exports face restrictions. According to NS3.AI, Aref emphasized that other nations should not anticipate enjoying this security without bearing any expenses. He further connected the stability of global fuel prices to the continuous lifting of economic and military pressures on Iran and its allies.

data.title: Fellowship PAC Receives Major Contributions Ahead of Midterm Elections
data.description: Fellowship PAC has reported a significant $10 million contribution from Cantor Fitzgerald in its initial fundraising disclosure. According to NS3.AI, the political action committee also received $1 million from Anchorage Digital. The PAC has endorsed Republican candidates in six races leading up to the November midterm elections. The filing has garnered attention due to the involvement of Jesse Spiro, who is the chairman of Fellowship PAC and also serves as the vice president of regulatory affairs at Tether US.

data.title: Moody's: Stablecoins Pose Limited Short-Term Threat to Banks
data.description: Moody's has assessed that stablecoins currently pose a limited short-term threat to banks, despite the market surpassing $300 billion. According to NS3.AI, Abhi Srivastava noted that while the immediate impact on banks is minimal, the broader adoption of stablecoins and real-world assets could potentially weaken bank deposits and lending capacity over time.

data.title: 曦智科技 Plans Hong Kong IPO with Up to 13.79 Million Shares
data.description: 曦智科技 has announced its intention to list on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, proposing to issue up to 13.79 million H shares, subject to the exercise of the over-allotment option. According to Jin10, the maximum price per share is set at HKD 183.2. The company expects the shares to begin trading on April 28.

data.title: SkyBridge Capital's Scaramucci Predicts Bitcoin Could Hit $1 Million
data.description: SkyBridge Capital founder Anthony Scaramucci has projected that Bitcoin could eventually reach a value of $1 million. According to NS3.AI, Scaramucci highlighted that Morgan Stanley's recent involvement in the cryptocurrency market is significantly boosting Bitcoin's adoption among both individual and institutional investors.

data.title: Iran Claims Drone Strike on U.S. Warship Following Alleged Attack
data.description: Iran's Supreme Joint Military Command announced that its forces have targeted a U.S. warship using drones. According to NS3.AI, the command stated that this action was in response to a U.S. attack on an Iranian vessel. The statement linked the incident to direct military engagements between Iran and the United States.

data.title: DeFi Faces Challenges in 2026 Amid Rising Hacks
data.description: The year 2026 is emerging as a challenging period for decentralized finance (DeFi) due to an increase in hacking incidents. According to CoinDesk, the Chief Technology Officer of Ledger highlighted that this year could be the worst for DeFi in terms of security breaches. The recent Kelp exploit underscores the vulnerabilities within the system, demonstrating how a single point of failure can have widespread repercussions across interconnected platforms. This incident has raised concerns about the robustness of DeFi infrastructures and the need for enhanced security measures to protect against such threats. As the DeFi sector continues to grow, the importance of addressing these security challenges becomes increasingly critical to maintain trust and stability in the ecosystem.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 74,000 USDT with a 2.40% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 19, 2026, 22:01 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 74,000 USDT and is now trading at 73,953.203125 USDT, with a narrowed 2.40% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold and Silver Prices Decline Amid Market Volatility
data.description: Gold prices have fallen below $4,830 per ounce, opening 1.41% lower. According to Jin10, silver also experienced a significant drop, with prices decreasing by over 2% to $78.98 per ounce at the start of trading on Monday. The decline in precious metals comes amid ongoing market volatility, affecting investor sentiment and trading strategies.

data.title: Iran Rejects Trump's Optimism, WTI Crude Oil Rises 5%
data.description: On April 20, Jin10 reported that U.S. President Donald Trump's optimistic statements were countered by Iran over the weekend, leading to a significant impact on the markets. According to Jin10, WTI crude oil opened 5% higher on Monday, reaching $91.35 per barrel. Meanwhile, U.S. stock futures showed a downward trend, with the Nasdaq futures dropping by 0.9%.

data.title: CME FedWatch Tool: High Probability of No Rate Change in April
data.description: According to Jin10, the CME FedWatch Tool indicates a 99.5% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in April, with only a 0.5% chance of a 25 basis point rate hike. Looking ahead to June, the tool suggests a 95% probability of rates remaining unchanged, a 4.5% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut, and a 0.5% chance of a 25 basis point rate increase.

data.title: AI Startups Secure Major Share of Global Venture Funding in Q1 2026
data.description: AI startups attracted approximately $242 billion in venture funding during the first quarter of 2026, accounting for 80% of global startup investments. According to NS3.AI, this figure surpasses the total AI startup funding for the entire year of 2025. OpenAI alone raised $122 billion in this period. However, Bloomberg reported that around half of the planned U.S. AI data centers for 2026 faced delays or cancellations.

data.title: Japan Seeks Alternative Aluminum Sources Amid Middle East Supply Disruption
data.description: Japan is facing challenges in securing aluminum supplies as its reliance on the Middle East has been disrupted by the ongoing conflict involving Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that the severance of key shipping routes has compelled Japanese companies to reduce production and urgently seek alternative sources for aluminum. This situation underscores the vulnerability of Japan's supply chain and the broader impact of geopolitical tensions on global trade.

data.title: El Salvador's President Bukele Tops Approval Ratings Amid Security Gains
data.description: El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele has achieved a 94% approval rating, leading a ranking of 26 world leaders. According to NS3.AI, this high level of support is attributed more to improvements in national security than to his Bitcoin policies. Despite the focus on security, El Salvador continues its strategy of purchasing approximately one Bitcoin per day.

data.title: UAE Minister Highlights Civilian Targeting Amid Conflict
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has been subjected to over 2,800 missile and drone attacks in the first 40 days of the conflict involving the U.S., Israel, and Iran, with more than 90% of the targets being civilian infrastructure. According to BlockBeats, UAE Minister of State for International Cooperation, Reem Al Hashimy, stated on Sunday that Iran is attempting to undermine the UAE's model of prosperity and tolerance.

When questioned about U.S. President Donald Trump's assessment of a regime change in Iran, Al Hashimy expressed skepticism regarding any substantial changes in Iran's leadership. "I know there have been personnel changes. There are different figures in place," she noted, adding that the impact on the nature of the Revolutionary Guards remains uncertain and currently appears bleak.

Regarding concerns over Trump's threats, Al Hashimy emphasized that the UAE views "maximum pressure" as essential for progress, while cautioning against attacks on civilians.
